text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Overlord is victorious! A tribute to<n>my worthy
foe for a riveting<n>competition! A tribute to my fans
for<n>an outstanding ovation!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
However... this ruler who vies to<n>become the
Centurial Overlord must<n>remain steadfast at the
top of this<n>generation.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I advance my pieces onward to<n>the
Japanese Derby, a fitting venue<n>to further bolster
my name!
